title: T-036 — SCN-060 Split LP UI (3-step) (06-c)
prompt:
# T-036 — SCN-060 Split LP

PRD: 06-SCANNER-P1-PRD.md §8.3 FR-SC-FE-032
UX: design/06-SCANNER-P1-UX.md:482-505 §3.11
Prototype: design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/flow-other.jsx:111-150 (split_scan_screen), :152-193 (split_qty_screen)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Deliver SCN-060 3-step Split LP — scan LP → qty input with live preview ('Oryginał: 30 kg / Nowy: 20 kg') → done (2-card side-by-side, gray original / green new, inherited batch).

## Implementation contract
1. /scanner/split, /scanner/split/[lpId]/qty, /scanner/split/done.
2. Live preview computes original.qty - split_qty as user types.
3. Submit POSTs /split-lp; on success render side-by-side split cards (gray for original, green for new) per §9.9.

## Files
- apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/split/page.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/split/[lpId]/qty/page.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/scanner/split/done/page.tsx [create]
- apps/scanner/__tests__/scn-060-split.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the 3 steps render, when compared to `design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/flow-other.jsx:111-150,152-193` and §9.9 split-grid, then they show the same scan area, the same qty input with live preview, and the same gray/green side-by-side split cards on done — RTL snapshot + manual checklist
2. Given LP qty=30 and the user types split_qty=35, when the qty step revalidates, then submit is disabled and an inline error 'Wartość większa niż dostępna ilość' is shown
3. Given a successful POST /split-lp, when the done step renders, then both LP cards show the same inherited batch and 14px monospace LP numbers with letterspacing 2

## Test strategy
- RED: write scn-060-split.test.tsx asserting parity + qty over-limit + inherited-batch render before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter scanner test scn-060-split'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow split_qty ≥ original qty (client check + server enforce)
- Do not omit the live preview
- Do not navigate to done before /split-lp returns 200

pipeline_inputs.description: SCN-060 split-LP UI (scan / qty with live preview / done with gray-green side-by-side cards).
pipeline_inputs.details:
Parity checklist:
1) Scan area on step 1.
2) Qty input with live preview computing original.qty - split_qty.
3) Done step uses §9.9 split-grid layout, gray original card + green new card.
4) Inherited batch shown identically on both cards.
5) split_qty < original qty enforced client-side.
out_of_scope: Do not implement merge-LP (out of P1)
acceptance_criteria: Given the 3 steps render, when compared to design/Monopilot Design System/scanner/flow-other.jsx:111-150 and :152-193 + §9.9 split-grid, then they show the same scan area, qty input with live preview, and gray/green side-by-side split cards on done — RTL snapshot + manual checklist
Given LP qty=30 and split_qty=35 typed, when the qty step revalidates, then submit is disabled and inline error 'Wartość większa niż dostępna ilość' is shown
Given a successful POST /split-lp, when the done step renders, then both LP cards show the same inherited batch and 14px monospace LP numbers with letterspacing 2
test_strategy: RED: write scn-060-split.test.tsx asserting parity + over-limit + inherited-batch render before implementation
risk_red_lines: Do not allow split_qty ≥ original qty
Do not navigate to done before 200
